scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then alchemy dev --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else alchemy dev "$@"; fi' --
scripts.plan: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then alchemy deploy --dry-run --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else alchemy deploy --dry-run "$@"; fi' --
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then alchemy deploy --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else alchemy deploy "$@"; fi' --
scripts.destroy: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then alchemy destroy --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else alchemy destroy "$@"; fi' --
